creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: (I see now that Jakub's original message already points to "all the Qt5 packages" and I only noticed the message in 47/47 for declarative test) Fixed in 613a0476fffb84ebab668d4737575c1280024b2e although I didn't bump any packages. The post-deinstall message is harmless (for the qt5 packages anyway).
